question: Treat me like the White House.
You don't need to whisper—they're made of wax.
It’s only a 12 second flight.
I told your parents I would convert.
Okay. Now you be the naughty mosquito, and I'll be the tormented sporting goods salesman.
problem:
<image>The image is a cartoon from the New Yorker Cartoon Caption Contest.
I will provide you with five captions, one of which matches the cartoon image, and the others are unrelated. Choose the caption that best matches the cartoon image: 
A) Treat me like the White House.
B) You don't need to whisper—they're made of wax.
C) It’s only a 12 second flight.
D) I told your parents I would convert.
E) Okay. Now you be the naughty mosquito, and I'll be the tormented sporting goods salesman.
visual_info:
<info1>A bedroom setting with typical furnishings.</info1>
<info2>A woman wearing a nightgown lying in bed on one side.</info2>
<info3>A large three-dimensional model of the US Capitol building positioned on the bed.</info3>
<info4>The Capitol model occupies approximately 4/5 of the bed's width.</info4>
<info5>The woman and Capitol model are both under the bed covers.</info5>
<info6>The woman is physically hugging the Capitol model.</info6>
<info7>The Capitol model is oriented parallel to the woman, resembling a bed partner.</info7>
<info8>The woman's mouth is open, indicating speech.</info8>
<info9>The Capitol model is depicted in miniature scale relative to its real-world size.</info9>
<info10>The Capitol model occupies the space where a human companion would typically lie.</info10>
